original_image_tags: Aged, cream-colored lined notebook page with three hole-punch marks on the left margin and a faint vertical red margin line. The page contains two faded stamps in opposite corners. The top right stamp is in pink ink and reads "RECEIVED" above the date "JUL 2 1953" and "F.B.I. INTERNAL SECURITY". The bottom right stamp is in blue ink and is rotated 90 degrees clockwise; it reads "RECEIVED" above "Jul 21 9 42 PM '54" and "INTERNAL SECURITY / F. B. I.". There are faint, illegible pencil marks or smudges at the very top of the page.

elements.description: A faint, upside-down pink stamped text at the top right reads 'RECEIVED JUL 2 1943'. A blue stamped block at the bottom right reads 'RECEIVED JUL 21 9 42 AM '41 INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.' followed by illegible text. The page contains horizontal blue lines and a vertical red line typical of lined notebook paper, with several hole-punch marks along the edges.

judge.reason: The descriptions quote different verbatim text for the same stamps (e.g., pink stamp date 'JUL 2 1953' vs 'JUL 2 1943'; blue stamp date/time 'JUL 21 9 42 PM '54' vs 'JUL 21 9 42 AM '41'), indicating at least one side is hallucinating specific details.
